functional_requirements.description: User can create account using email and password.

validations.description: Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.

risks.description: Email uniqueness check may fail if race condition occurs during concurrent account creation.

missing_information: Password complexity requirements (e.g., uppercase, lowercase, digits, special characters) are not specified.
Email format validation rules are not specified.
Account creation confirmation or verification process is not described.
Error handling and user feedback for duplicate email or invalid password are not defined.

requirement_items.description: User can create account using email and password.
Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.
Email uniqueness check may fail if race condition occurs during concurrent account creation.
